subcodes.first_line: O Abá'l-Ḥasan! Hearken unto the Call from the precinct of eternity, from the tongue of thy Lord, the Knower of the hidden and the manifest. Verily, there is no God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن ان استمع الندآء من شطر القدم من لسان ربک عالم السر و العلن انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
